items.text: Kim Pil-nyeon, 『Dong-seo munmyeong-gwa jayeon gwahak』 (East-West Civilization and Natural Science), Seoul: Kkachi, 1992.
Kim Hyun-ja, 『Joreuju Dwimejil, Indo-Yureop sinhwa-ui bigyo yeongu』 (Georges Dumézil, A Comparative Study of Indo-European Mythology), Seoul: Minumsa, 2018.

Kim Hyung-hyo, "Wonsi banbon-gwa haewon sasang-e daehan cheolhakjeok seongchal - Jeungsan sasang-ui han yeongu" (Philosophical Reflection on Wonsibanbon and Haewon Thought - A Study of Jeungsan Thought) 『Dongseo cheolhak-e daehan juchejeok girok』, Seoul: Koryowon, 1985.
, 『Derida-wa Nojang-ui dokbeop』 (Derrida and the Reading Method of Lao-Zhuang), Academy of Korean Studies, 1994.
Kim Hye-sook, 『Sin eumyangnon』 (New Yin-Yang Theory), Seoul: Ewha Womans University Press, 2014.
Kim Ho-jong et al., 『(Chang-ui seolgye) Siryong teurijeu: Hangukhyeong』 ((Creative Design) Practical TRIZ: Korean Style), Seoul: Jinsaem Media, 2011.
Kim Hong-cheol, 『Jeungsangyo sasang yeongu』 (A Study on Jeungsanism Thought), Iksan: Wonkwang University Press, 2000.
Kim Heup-young, 『Do-ui sinhak』 (Theology of the Dao), Seoul: Dasan Glbang, 2005.

Kim Hee-jung, 『Mom gukga uju hana-reul kkumkkuda: Hwangjesagyeong, Gwanjasapyeon, Hoenamja, Hwangjenaegyeong yeongu』 (Dreaming of Body, State, and Cosmos as One: A Study on Huangdi Sijing, Guanzi Sipian, Huainanzi, and Huangdi Neijing), Seoul: Gungri, 2008.
Na Jeong-won, 『Hanguk jonggyo-wa geundaehwa-ui jeongchi sasang』 (Korean Religion and Political Thought of Modernization), Seoul: M-Ad, 2018.

Nakazawa Shinichi, translated by Kim Ok-hee, 『Daechingseong illyuhak: Muuisik-eseo balgyeonhaneun daeanjeok jiseong』 (Symmetry Anthropology: Discovering Alternative Intelligence in the Unconscious), Dongasia, 2004.
Nam Hyo-on, translated by Park Dae-hyun, 『Chugangjip』 (Collected Works of Chugang), Seoul: Minjok Munhwa Chujinhoe, 2007.
Lao Siguang, translated by Jeong In-jae, 『Jungguk cheolhaksa: Godaepyeon』 (History of Chinese Philosophy: Ancient Period), Seoul: Tamgudang, 1989.
Laozi, translated by Kim Kyung-soo, 『Noja yeokju』 (Laozi with Translation and Commentary), Seoul: Munsachul, 2009.
Dang Hyeon-seon, 『Jilbereu Dwirang-ui sangsanggye yeongu』 (A Study on Gilbert Durand's Imaginary), Hongik University Master's Thesis, 2009.
Daniel L. Pals, co-translated by Jo Byeong-ryeon and Jeon Jung-hyun, 『Jonggyo-e daehan yeodeol gaji irondeul』 (Eight Theories of Religion), Goyang: Hanguk Gidokgyo Yeonguso, 2013.
Do Gwang-soon, 『Dogyo-wa gwahak』 (Daoism and Science), Seoul: Bibong Chulpansa, 1990.

Dong Guangbi, translated by Lee Seok-myeong, 『Doga-reul chajaganeun gwahakjadeul: Hyeondae sin doga-ui sasang-gwa segye』 (Scientists in Search of Daoism: The Thought and World of Modern New Daoism), Seoul: Yemoon Seowon, 1994.
Leibniz, compiled and translated by Lee Dong-hee, 『Raipeunicheu-ga mannan Jungguk』 (Leibniz's Encounter with China), Seoul: Ihaksa, 2003.
Lévi-Strauss, translated by Ahn Jeong-nam, 『Yasaeng-ui sago』 (The Savage Mind), Seoul: Hangilsa, 1996.

Roger T. Ames and David L. Hall, translated by Jang Won-seok, 『Ilsangsa-e chotjeom matchugi: 『Jungyong』-ui beonyeok-gwa cheolhakjeok haeseok』 (Focusing on the Familiar: A Translation and Philosophical Interpretation of the Zhongyong), Seongnam: Academy of Korean Studies Press, 2019.
